trigger_keywords: factor natural tiende a aumentar la acidez en la uva

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A vineyard is planted at higher altitude, where temperatures are generally lower, especially at night.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Cooler ripening conditions slow respiration and reduce the loss of grape acids.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The grapes tend to retain higher natural acidity than comparable fruit grown at lower, warmer elevation.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: The grapes tend to retain higher natural acidity than comparable fruit grown at lower, warmer elevation.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
